sentences.text: Thank you for calling Mark realty company our office hours are eight AM to five PM Monday through Friday, we are closed for lunch from twelve PM to one PM for emergencies press nine to be directed to the long haul person. If you are resident who has a resident inquiry or a maintenance request please visit our website at W W W dot Morrow companies dot. Com and click on the icon on the top of the front page that says resident inquiries press one for property management press two for human resources press three for accounting press four for development and construction press five for our dial by name directory using the keys on your touch tone phone. Please enter the name of the party you wish to reach last name birth. Your call is being transferred please hold. Your call has been forwarded to an automated voice messaging system. Matt, Cornell, seven is not available at the tone please record your message. When you finished recording you may hang up or press one for more options to leave a call back number press five.

Hey, Matt, this is Alyssa with rentable. Give me a call back when you get this message just wanted to chat through the update I had sent you over to six two three eight three four five six eight thanks.

conversation.title: Call: Alyssa Tillich and Matt Cornelson @ Morrow Realty Co, Inc.
